content:
## Enzo — Core Pain (hardened 2026-06-05, thesis-under-test)

Reps drown in accounts and can't tell which one needs them next. The pain is judgment-at-scale: knowing the next best action per account, not logging activity. Hardened 2026-06-05 as the live strategic anchor.

## What Enzo solves for

A proactive next-best-action layer over the rep's book of business. Ships as a CLI plus a desktop app for non-technical reps.

# Hosted deploy smoke

Manual curl checklist run after each deploy to verify the box is up.

## Stack conventions

TypeScript everywhere; pnpm workspaces; conventional commits.
